basic_details.job_title: CAU Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor
basic_details.short_information: The Central Agricultural University (CAU) Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released under Advt No. 02/2026 on the official website. A total of 22 vacancies have been announced for the posts of Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor in various veterinary disciplines.

age_limit.age_limit: Professor: Below 55 years; Associate Professor: Below 50 years; Assistant Professor: Max 40 years (as on last date).
age_limit.details: Professor: Max 55 years. Relaxation: SC/ST as per Govt norms, OBC 3 years, PwBD 10 years. Associate Professor: Max 50 years. Relaxation: SC/ST as per Govt norms, OBC 3 years, PwBD 10 years. Assistant Professor: Max 40 years. Relaxation: SC/ST as per Govt norms, OBC 3 years, PwBD 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral degree in relevant subject with required years of experience and publications for Professor/Associate Professor; Master's degree with NET for Assistant Professor.
qualification.details: Professor: Doctoral degree in relevant subject, Recognized veterinary qualification, B.V.Sc. & A.H. with 55% marks, Master's degree with 55% marks, and 10 years experience in relevant subject. Associate Professor: Doctoral degree in relevant subject, Recognized veterinary qualification, B.V.Sc. & A.H. with 55% marks, Master's degree with 55% marks, and 8 years experience in relevant subject. Assistant Professor: Master's degree with 55% marks and NET qualified.

salary_details.salary_range: Academic Level 14 (Rs.1,44,200/-), Academic Level 13A (Rs.1,31,400/-), Academic Level 10 (Rs. 57,700/-)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic and career performance Presentation/Seminar/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CAU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Central Agricultural University recruitment 2026 is 10 May 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their registration well before the deadline to avoid any technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CAU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies available for the positions of Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor across various veterinary departments at the Central Agricultural University, Imphal.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, the application fee is exempted for SC, ST, PwBD, and Women candidates. Candidates belonging to the UR and OBC categories are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 1,000.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for an Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor position is 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms, including 3 years for OBC and 10 years for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for CAU?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: shortlisting of candidates based on their academic and career performance, followed by a presentation, seminar, or personal interview to assess the candidate's suitability for the teaching position.

faq.question: Q6. Can I apply offline for these posts?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for the Central Agricultural University recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must visit the official website at www.cau.ac.in to submit their applications and upload the required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for an Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Assistant Professors are placed under Academic Level 10, which carries a starting salary of Rs. 57,700 per month, in addition to other admissible allowances as per the university and government regulations.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the online application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to upload their educational certificates, proof of experience, and other relevant documents in a single PDF file. The file size must not exceed 60 MB to be successfully uploaded on the portal.

faq.question: Q9. Is NET mandatory for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for the post of Assistant Professor, a Master's degree with 55% marks and being NET (National Eligibility Test) qualified is a mandatory requirement as per the university's recruitment guidelines.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Central Agricultural University located?
faq.answer: The Central Agricultural University (CAU) is located in Imphal, Manipur, with the pincode 795004. It is a premier institution for agricultural education and research in the North-Eastern region of India.
